operations.text: AIS delivers the solution as one integrated AI/ML operating model: intake the mission need, build governed data and model assets, monitor performance and risk, and audit decisions against agency policy.

DataLance supports the AI/ML platform as the data-product and decision-framework layer, giving teams a repeatable way to qualify sources, trace lineage, and move from ingestion to governed intelligence.

rows: Confirm use case, risk, data readiness, and approval path.
Develop governed data, model, and integration assets.
Track quality, drift, usage, and operational risk.
Maintain evidence for compliance and decision traceability.

comment_replies.reply: Added an opening integration paragraph that links the AI/ML platform, DataLance support layer, governance, and proof points into one solution story.
